title: Moons 128x Better Armor
description: This 128x armor pack reflects both simplistic armor while looking clean and pvp ready!
body:
This texture pack is one of my favorite so far! it is 128x and has changed the 3 types of armor. 

Leather armor 

Diamond armor

Iron armor

The design is made to look like normal pixelized armor accept every pixel has an outline and an inline. 

Please email me here with any issues: wowmoonwow@proton.me
